stemHtml: For which of the following reasons is TCAS II linked to the ADC.

options.a: Altitude information is used to inhibit 'Climb' RA's when aircraft performance is limited at its maximum flight level
options.b: Vertical speed information is used to inhibit RA's at maximum airspeed or close to the stall speed.
options.c: Heading and track information fo avoidance RA's
